data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Melonie Díaz (born April 25, 1984) is an American actress who has been appeared in many independent films, including four shown at the 2008 Sundance Film Festival.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Melonie Díaz , licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
